name: Double Mustard Chicken
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Home-Style Inner Beauty Hot Sauce, or honey mustard
recipeInstructions:
1. Whisk together the brown sugar, apple cider vinegar, dijon mustard, Home-Style Inner Beauty Hot Sauce (or honey mustard), dried thyme, and dried tarragon in a bowl.
2. Add the garlic to the mixture and continue whisking until well combined.
3. Place the chicken breast halves in a resealable plastic bag or container large enough to hold them with the marinade.
4. Pour the marinade over the chicken, ensuring all pieces are evenly coated.
5. Seal the bag or cover the container and refrigerate for at least one hour, preferably longer for more flavor.
6. When ready to cook, grill the marinated chicken over hot coals.
7. HEALTH REMINDER: Do NOT use any leftover marinade as a basting or serving sauce for the cooked chicken. Discard it, as it has been in contact with raw chicken and could contain salmonella.
